description: A single rear-wheel-drive, Ackermann-steered physics car on flat asphalt. The WheeledLab-equivalent body as plain MJCF, loaded by Newton's MJCF importer and driven by the generic worldsim step(action) tool. Smoke scene for the controller before the full SF city.

action_descriptions.drive_rl: rear-left wheel target angular velocity (rad/s); + = forward
action_descriptions.drive_rr: rear-right wheel target angular velocity (rad/s); + = forward

chassis.description: Car body; read pose with get_object_state('chassis')

sensors.chassis_pos: framepos of the chassis (x, y, z)
sensors.chassis_linvel: linear velocity of the chassis (world frame)

reach-waypoint.description: Drive the chassis to a goal (x, y) without flipping
